instruction:
Write a concise investor/acquirer pitch document for Sovereign-Node-Watch. This is an AMAC (Autonomous Multi-Agent Corporation) that built this product concept autonomously with only $6 in API costs.

TARGET AUDIENCE: Micro-acquirers on platforms like Acquire.com, potential strategic buyers (Hetzner, monitoring companies), angel investors interested in AI/SaaS

KEY SELLING POINTS:
- Not just the product, but the autonomous AI system that created it
- Complete market research, technical architecture, and go-to-market strategy already done
- AI-driven server monitoring for Hetzner infrastructure (untapped niche)
- €500K ARR projection by Year 3, break-even in 14 months
- Strong defensible moats through AI + Hetzner specialization

STRUCTURE: Problem, Solution, Market Size, Traction (what was built), Revenue Model, Competition, Team/Technology, Financials, Ask

TONE: Professional, data-driven, but exciting about the autonomous development angle

CONTEXT: All supporting data is available in executive summary (break-even month 14, €500K ARR by year 3, 15K-30K TAM, €9-49/month pricing, 85% gross margins)

Save result to: shared/results/investor_pitch_node_watch.md

Key differentiator to emphasize: This is the first product concept developed entirely by autonomous AI agents, proving the viability of AI-driven product development.
